description: An automated riveting machine must install thousands of rivets to attach the skin to the underlying wing structure.

nodes.task_description: Load the correct riveting program for the specific wing panel into the machine.

expected_outcome.value: Agent loads the correct NC program.

nodes.task_description: Operate the machine to drill the holes and install the rivets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent oversees the automated riveting process.

nodes.task_description: Perform a quality inspection to ensure all rivets are properly installed and have no defects.

expected_outcome.value: Agent inspects the rivets and confirms they all meet quality standards.
